properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key for signing JSON Web Tokens (JWT).

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: Expiration time for JWT in seconds.

properties.name: google.oauth.client-id
properties.description: Google OAuth2 Client ID used for ID Token verification.

properties.name: app.documents.dir
properties.description: Base directory for application documents and file uploads.

properties.name: app.prometheus.url
properties.description: Prometheus server URL for backend proxy queries.

properties.name: app.backend-url
properties.description: Public Spring Boot backend URL for ECPay server callback.

properties.name: app.frontend-url
properties.description: Frontend application URL for redirection after payment.

properties.name: ecpay.hash-key
properties.description: ECPay Hash Key for security validation.

properties.name: ecpay.hash-iv
properties.description: ECPay Hash IV for security validation.

properties.name: ecpay.api-url
properties.description: ECPay API URL (Payment gateway page URL).

properties.name: ecpay.return-url
properties.description: ECPay Return URL for Server-to-server callback.

properties.name: ecpay.order-result-url
properties.description: ECPay Order Result URL for client redirection from ECPay page.

properties.name: ecpay.client-back-url
properties.description: ECPay Client Back URL (Frontend client landing page after payment).
